modals.mailer_description: To send an email, you can choose from several email clients. Select the one of your choice.
modals.mailer_error: You must choose an email client.

projects.voyo: Voyo facilitates housing searches with advanced filters, developed in Flutter and Flask for a university project.
projects.platformerunity: This platformer developed on Unity marked my beginnings in creating 2D games with this engine. I explored Tilemaps, animations, and audio, enriching my mastery of C#. This project also allowed me to single-handedly drive a video game for the first time, including level design.
projects.spaceshooter: In my third year of BUT, we created a team game using Godot and GDScript. Inspired by Atari's Asteroids, this space-shooter introduced me to pair-programming to develop the 3D menu. I contributed to player movements, projectile management, and configuration files. This experience familiarized me with Godot, its nodes, signals, and resources.

landing.developer_description: I am a 20-year-old French (junior) developer. I love using my spare time to develop personal projects of all kinds. Passionate about computers, I am always looking for new technologies and new projects.

consentModal.title: Do you want a cookie? 🍪
consentModal.description: Our website uses tracking cookies to understand how you interact with it. Tracking will only be enabled if you explicitly accept it.

sections.title: Use of Cookies 📢
sections.description: We use cookies to ensure the basic functionalities of the website and to enhance your online experience.

sections.title: Strictly Necessary Cookies
sections.description: These cookies are essential for the proper functioning of the website. Without these cookies, the site would not function properly.

body.name: NEXT_LOCALE
body.expiration: Expires at the end of the session.

sections.title: Performance and Analytics Cookies
sections.description: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you have made in the past.

sections.title: More Information
sections.description: For any questions related to our cookie policy and your choices, please contact us through site support.
